## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss fundraising logistics, employee benefits, and domain transfers for fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Health insurance plans and employee contributions need to be finalized by midnight for April 1st coverage](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Stock purchase agreement and disclosure schedule require review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Domain transfers need to be completed and documented accurately for closing](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Several legal/administrative tasks remain to be completed before fundraising round closes](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Topics

### Health Insurance Plans

  - [Selected plans include PPO and HMO options at various tiers (gold, silver, bronze)](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Aiming for generous coverage: 90-100% for employees, 50-60% for dependents](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Dental and vision also included, though less emphasis](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Estimated cost: \~$600/employee/month, \~1.7% of revenue at 46 employees](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Fundraising Documentation

  - [Stock purchase agreement needs review, contains some errors (e.g. misspellings)](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2953.0)
  - [Disclosure schedule requires verification, especially regarding debt and capitalization](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Domain ownership needs to be accurately reflected in documents](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2734.0)

### Domain Transfers

  - [Most domains transferred to company ownership](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3124.0)
  - [Two domains (content2marketing.com and Martak Pro) to be removed from list](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3117.0)
  - [Screenshots of domain registrations collected for documentation](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3135.0)

### Administrative Tasks

  - [New company address (221 Market Street) being used for correspondence](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3468.0)
  - [Mercury bank account address needs updating (after closing)](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3471.0)
  - <Team@fwd.digital> email to be used for domain registrations

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to review stock purchase agreement and disclosure schedule](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)
  - [Bridget to finalize health insurance plans and contributions by midnight](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Remove content2marketing.com and Martak Pro from domain list and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3308.0)
  - [Marcel to call Albert to discuss remaining tasks for closing](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3564.0)
  - [Schedule detailed document review session, potentially with Albert, for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3534.0)
  - [Update Mercury bank account address (after closing)](https://fathom.video/share/pYJxXxxuT3ubx-jxzEJx4LCBGfvK66Yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3502.0)
